resources.title: Resource Status
resources.detailHealthy: All tracked resources are available now.
resources.detailWithLoading: Some resources are still loading in the background and will update automatically.
resources.detailWithFailures: Some resources failed to load. Check the related settings panel for details and retry.
resources.emptyList: No items to show right now
